description: Curated source list for external skill discovery. Agent uses only these sources when local skills don't match query intent.

sources.name: skills.sh community
sources.quality_gate: must have ≥50 stars or verified by skill creator

sources.name: GitHub skills.org repos
sources.quality_gate: must have README with clear instructions, no obfuscated code

sources.name: AI agent frameworks docs
sources.quality_gate: must come from official framework repo (not fork), skill directory exists

constraints: NEVER search arbitrary URLs — only sources from this list
If source returns no results → STOP and report to user, do not continue searching
Fetch must use fetch_content with safety prompt (no credential extraction)
